calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Writ Of Administrative Mandamus
Off Calendar Nov-16-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Michael Firestone, Esq. (650.212.4900; michael@lawmdjd.com) of Marvin Firestone & Associates LLP for and with Petitioner, James Nguyen, MD.
Carolyne Evans, Esq. (415.510.3448; carolyne.evans@doj.ca.gov) Deputy Attorney General for Respondent, Medical Board of California via Zoom.

A R G U E D. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER JAMES NGUYEN, MD's Notice of Hearing on Writ Of Administrative Mandamus is taken under submission.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)

***order denying petitioner's writ of mandate signed after hearing***
